subcodes.first_line: O thou son of him who traversed the deserts, crossed the seas, trod the valleys, and ascended the mountains in the path of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا بن من قطع القفار و خاض البحار و طوی المهاوی و صعد الجبال فی سبیل الله شکر
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @eulogies; reminiscences, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
